summary: A well‑balanced FOH (matrix) recording that many fans prefer over louder alternatives.
review: The reviewer rates this FOH NAK‑300 pull as a "quite good" source, noting its balanced sound compared to the louder AMS‑250 uploads. No comments are made about the musical performance itself, so the analysis focuses on the favorable technical qualities of the recording.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one 4‑star review mentioning a good, balanced recording; no performance details to adjust the rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Balanced sound with less boom than other versions; generally praised as a solid FOH capture.
